content:
[{'text': "The robot is at (7.95, 9.19) and the red dot is still appearing in the black wall region on the map. However, LiDAR shows 1.89m clear ahead. The robot seems to be navigating along the top edge of the middle corridor. 

Looking at the map structure: the map shows horizontal black bands. The robot appears to be in the black band between the two white corridors. But LiDAR is consistently showing clear space, which means the robot IS in free space — the map rendering may be showing the robot at the boundary.

The destination is at (11.51, 13.67). I'm at (7.95, 9.19). I need to go northeast. The front has 1.89m clear. Let me continue east to get closer to the destination's x-coordinate, then look for a northward passage.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_016sYpLC17FCqJ5MkVpQBHPQ', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 1.0}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
